tool_args.label: MTA Board
tool_args.raw_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval.

tool_args.label: 2025 Operations Year in Review
tool_args.raw_text: JANUARY 2026 - 2025 Operations Year in Review. A review of the prior year's performance of railroad will be provided to the Committee.

payload.description: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad will be provided to the Committee.

tool_args.label: Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2026
tool_args.raw_text: FEBRUARY 2026 - Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2026. The Agency will present its revised 2026 Financial Plan.

payload.description: The Agency will present its revised 2026 Financial Plan.

tool_args.label: Annual Elevator/Escalator Report
tool_args.raw_text: MARCH 2026 - Annual Elevator/Escalator Report. Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

payload.description: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

tool_args.label: Diversity & EEO Report – 4th Quarter 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MARCH 2026 - Diversity & EEO Report– 4 th Quarter 2025

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Schedule Change – March 2026
tool_args.raw_text: MARCH 2026 - Schedule Change. The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.

tool_args.label: 2025 Annual Ridership Report
tool_args.raw_text: APRIL 2026 - 2025 Annual Ridership Report. A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2025.

payload.description: A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2025 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results
tool_args.raw_text: MAY 2026 - Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.event_name: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results
payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.

tool_args.label: Diversity & EEO Report – 1st Quarter 2026
tool_args.raw_text: JUNE 2026 - Diversity & EEO Report– 1 st Quarter 2026

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Mid-Year Operations Update
tool_args.raw_text: JULY 2026 - Mid-Year Operations Update

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of the Agency's key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2026.

tool_args.label: 2027 Preliminary Budget
tool_args.raw_text: SEPTEMBER 2026 - 2027 Preliminary Budget. Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.

payload.description: Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.

tool_args.label: 2026 Mid-Year Forecast
tool_args.raw_text: SEPTEMBER 2026 - 2026 Mid-Year Forecast. The agency will provide the 2026 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

payload.description: The agency will provide the 2026 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

tool_args.label: Safety/Security Update
tool_args.raw_text: SEPTEMBER 2026 - Safety/Security Update. The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.

payload.description: The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.

tool_args.label: Diversity & EEO Report – 2nd Quarter 2026
tool_args.raw_text: SEPTEMBER 2026 - Diversity & EEO Report– 2 nd Quarter 2026

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Schedule Change – September 2026
tool_args.raw_text: SEPTEMBER 2026 - Schedule Change. The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.

tool_args.label: 2027 Preliminary Budget – October 2026
tool_args.raw_text: OCTOBER 2026 - 2027 Preliminary Budget. Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.

payload.description: Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.

tool_args.label: 2027 Proposed Committee Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: NOVEMBER 2026 - 2027 Proposed Committee Work Plan. The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2027.

payload.description: The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2027.

tool_args.label: 2027 Final Proposed Budget
tool_args.raw_text: DECEMBER 2026 - 2027 Final Proposed Budget. The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2027.

payload.description: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2027.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2027 Committee Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: DECEMBER 2026 - Approval of 2027 Committee Work Plan. The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2027.

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2027.

tool_args.label: Diversity & EEO Report – 3rd Quarter 2026
tool_args.raw_text: DECEMBER 2026 - Diversity & EEO Report– 3 rd Quarter 2026

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Review of Committee Charter
tool_args.raw_text: DECEMBER 2026 - Review of Committee Charter. Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

payload.description: Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metric Report description
tool_args.raw_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics Report

tool_args.label: Approval of Minutes description
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.

payload.claim_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
payload.subject: Approval of Minutes

tool_args.label: President's Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments including safety, operations and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments including safety, operations and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

tool_args.label: Financial Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report
